entries.firstPrompt: The rate limiter is letting through 2x the configured limit. I think it's a sliding window calculation bug.
entries.summary: Fixed sliding window rate limiter allowing 2x configured limit. Root cause: denied requests were unconditionally pushed into the timestamp window, inflating the count and creating false gaps on expiry
entries.nativeSummary: Fixed sliding window rate limiter allowing 2x configured limit. Root cause: denied requests were unconditionally pushed into the timestamp window, inflating the count and creating false gaps on expiry.
entries.lastPrompt: The rate limiter is letting through 2x the configured limit. I think it's a sliding window calculation bug.

entries.firstPrompt: Add cursor-based pagination to the /api/users endpoint. Page size default 25, max 100.
entries.summary: Added cursor-based pagination to /api/users endpoint. Default page size 25, max 100. Uses fetch-one-extra pattern to detect hasMore.
entries.nativeSummary: Added cursor-based pagination to /api/users endpoint. Default page size 25, max 100. Uses fetch-one-extra pattern to detect hasMore.
entries.lastPrompt: Add cursor-based pagination to the /api/users endpoint. Page size default 25, max 100.
